meta.question: Navigate to "TMT‑APS Use Cases" and enumerate the top‑level use cases.
meta.finalAnswer:
The "TMT-APS Use Cases" package contains the following 11 top-level use cases:

1. Post Segment-Exchange Alignment
2. Maintenance Alignment
3. Rigid Body M3 Alignment
4. Off-Axis Measurements
5. On-Sky Measurement of Segment Warping Harness Influence Functions
6. Self Test
7. M1CS Sensor Calibration with Post Segment-Exchange Alignment
8. M2 and M3 Rigid Body Gravity Calibration
9. Wavefront Calibration
10. Pupil Registration Relative to SH and PIT
11. Reference Point Tracking on APT Camera Relative to PIT and SH

These use cases are organized under the "Use Cases" view within the TMT-APS Use Cases package.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS Use Cases"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("use")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" . 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement ?elem .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement ?elem .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("use case")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("use case")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("use")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:view .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("use case")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?elem), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("post")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("maintenance")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("rigid")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("initial")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("on-sky")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?useCasesView ?useCasesName ?subElem ?subName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?useCasesView .
  ?useCasesView rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?useCasesView vocab:NamedElement_name "Use%20Cases" .
  ?useCasesView vocab:Element_ownedElement ?subElem .
  OPTIONAL { ?subElem vocab:NamedElement_name ?subName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name "Use%20Cases" .
  ?view ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type WHERE {
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name "Use%20Cases" .
  ?view vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

9. Wavefront Calibration
10. Pupil Registration Relative to SH and PIT
11. Reference Point Tracking on APT Camera Relative to PIT and SH

These use cases are organized under the "Use Cases" view within the TMT-APS Use Cases package.
